title: Arbolith
description: Turns Terralith's colored trees into custom tree types made out of new wood and leaf blocks!
body:
![A screenshot of some blocks added by Arbolith](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1077/167/untitled.png)

Arbolith adds custom wood and leaf blocks to enhance Terralith's own colorful trees. Have you ever stumbled upon the gorgeous purple foliage of an Amethyst Jungle and wanted to take a piece of it with you, only to be disappointed that those leaves turned green as soon as you placed them down? This is the exact problem this mod was designed to solve.

It adds the following tree species:

*   Maple (orange and red variety)
*   Larch (yellow leaves)
*   Jacaranda (purple leaves)
*   Silverwood (blue leaves, exclusive to Mirage Isles)
*   Blooming Oak (white leaves, uses normal oak logs as trunk)

As their leaf blocks decay, they'll drop corresponding saplings too!

**NOTE:** Make sure to use the correct Forge mod version of Terralith with Arbolith as compatibility with different ones cannot be guaranteed. Check the file name to see which version it was designed for!
